top_visible_issues: No online booking system is present, which may limit conversion opportunities for a fitness and health business where clients typically expect to schedule sessions directly online.
Mobile page speed of 63 suggests room for optimisation, particularly relevant given that a significant portion of local service searches occur on mobile devices.
No blog or updates section is present, which may reduce opportunities for organic search visibility and ongoing client engagement in a competitive health and fitness market.
outreach_hook: Core Health and Performance has a strong reputation in Westport with an excellent review rating, and your website presents the business professionally. Adding an online booking flow and addressing a few mobile performance gaps could help convert more of that visibility into direct client enquiries. There may also be a straightforward opportunity to improve local search presence through a content or updates section that reflects the activity and expertise your reviews already highlight.
